name: continuous learning evidence section explicitly names SOC 2 CC4.1 and EU AI Act Article 12 satisfaction
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"event":"pr-corpus-learn","pattern_id":"p1","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'SOC 2 CC4.1' out.txt && grep -q 'EU AI Act Art.12' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
